headerDisplay: Apple Home control for an [e-note-ion](https://github.com/JasonPuglisi/e-note-ion) Vestaboard scheduler. Exposes Quiet and Public toggles on a single Vestaboard device.

baseUrl.title: Board URL
baseUrl.description: Base URL of the e-note-ion webhook listener (no trailing slash).

schedulerSecret.title: Scheduler secret
schedulerSecret.description: The 'scheduler' webhook credential, sent as X-Webhook-Secret when toggling.

stateSecret.title: State secret
stateSecret.description: The 'state' webhook credential, used to read current quiet/public state from GET /state.

pollInterval.title: Poll interval (seconds)
pollInterval.description: How often to poll GET /state. Use a long interval (e.g. 300) when push is enabled.

pushPort.title: Push listener port
pushPort.description: Optional. Port for instant push updates from e-note-ion. Set e-note-ion's [homebridge].url to http://<this-host>:<port>/. Leave blank to rely on polling only.

pushSecret.title: Push secret
pushSecret.description: Leave blank to auto-generate: a hash is stored here (not the secret) and the plaintext is printed in the Homebridge log once — copy it into e-note-ion's [homebridge].secret. Clear this field to rotate. You may also enter your own plaintext secret.
